title: Button-Zipper Lab
description: A playful getting-dressed laboratory that coaches real buttons and zippers in slow, patient motions before a solo victory lap.
learningGoals: Practice pushing and pulling buttons through buttonholes
Practice connecting and moving a zipper
Build fine-motor persistence through slow repeated motions
interactionModel: tap the large done row after each real-world dressing experiment; timers make room for patient fine-motor practice
feedbackModel: playful lab-scientist speech with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; every prompt makes patience and resting acceptable

modes.title: Zipper Lab
modes.skill: zipper connection, control, and dressing independence

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
